_note: Curated from pylint-odoo v8.x for Odoo v16. v16: `UserError(_('msg', arg))` lazy format (args passed to UserError directly), `_('msg', arg)` translation lazy pattern, `group_operator` still present (renamed `aggregator` v18), `_compute_display_name()` replaces `name_get()`.

rules.message: Manifest file is missing required key `name`.
Manifest file is missing required key `version`.
Manifest file is missing recommended key `author`.
Manifest file is missing recommended key `license`.
New model class is missing `_name` attribute.
ir.model.access entry missing from security CSV — model may be inaccessible.
XML id reference does not match any declared id in the module or its dependencies.
Translation string uses positional `%s` formatting — use named `%(name)s` or lazy `_('msg', arg)` pattern.
rules.fix_template: Use `_('Hello %(name)s') % {'name': name}` or `_('Hello %s', name)` (Odoo 16+ lazy format).

rules.message: File declared in manifest `data` list does not exist.
SQL injection risk: `cr.execute` called with string interpolation.
Built-in dynamic expression interpreter used with external input — use `odoo.tools.safe_eval` instead.
Hardcoded database ID used — use `env.ref()` instead.
`create()` override does not call `super()`.
`unlink()` override does not call `super()`.
String formatting used in UserError/ValidationError — use lazy args or named placeholders instead of %-interpolation.
rules.fix_template:
raise UserError(_('Hello %(name)s') % {'name': name})  # acceptable
raise UserError(_('Hello %s', name))  # preferred (Odoo 16+ lazy format)

rules.message: `name_get()` override detected — in v16 use `_compute_display_name()` instead.
Static assets declared via `qweb` key — use `assets` key with bundle names.
Unexpected `var`. Use `let` or `const` instead.
Unexpected `console` statement in production JS.
Reference to undeclared variable.
OWL template references a component not imported.
